resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-institutional-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool institutional investor profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns profile information for an institutional investor identified by their SEC CIK number, including fund name, manager and portfolio value.

resourceTemplates.name: eulerpool-institutional-portfolio
resourceTemplates.title: Eulerpool institutional 13F portfolio
resourceTemplates.description: Returns the latest 13-F portfolio holdings of an institutional investor identified by their SEC CIK number, including positions, share counts and portfolio allocation percentages.
